channel.title: Math Model on CrazyBread' Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Math Model on CrazyBread' Blog

item.title: Review
item.description:
数学建模期末复习

重要的知识点

矩阵条件数如何判断

MOE 模型结构图

graph LR
    %% 定义节点样式
    classDef active fill:#32CD32,stroke:#006400,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff;
    classDef inactive fill:#f9f9f9,stroke:#ddd,stroke-dasharray: 5 5,color:#ccc;
    classDef router fill:#4169E1,stroke:#00008B,color:#fff,stroke-width:2px;

    Input((输入 Token)) --> Router{Gating Network<br/>路由选择器}

    subgraph Experts [专家层 Expert Layer]
        E1[Expert 1]:::inactive
        E2[Expert 2]:::inactive
        E3[Expert 3]:::active
        E4[Expert 4]:::inactive
        E5[Expert 5]:::inactive
        E6[Expert 6]:::inactive
        E7[Expert 7]:::active
        E8[Expert 8]:::inactive
    end

    %% 路由指向激活的专家
    Router -- 权重 w1 --> E3
    Router -- 权重 w2 --> E7

    %% 专家输出汇合
    E3 --> Combine[求和/加权聚合]
    E7 --> Combine

    Combine --> Output((输出向量))

    %% 标注
    Router:::router
